title: Verify 'Remind me' toggle functionality
description: Test that a user can successfully enable the 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the Trial Corner hub.
3. Tap the toggle next to 'Remind me 24h before trial ends'.

expected_result: The toggle switches to the 'ON' state, and a confirmation message may be displayed. The 'remind-me-clicked' event is fired.
